name: The fatui’s plaything
description:
You a member of the house of heart who has been trying your best to survive, through your whole life. having to defeat many of your fellow orphans during the last few years and somehow managing to make this far on the cruel hands of “mother” now when you finally turned 20 and your escape plan was almost fully complete and you believed you could escape this cruel life that was imposed upon you... when you were about to pack your things for the escape you had designed… just before you could follow with your escape plan crucabena known as “the mother” called you into her office and there with her was an dangerous harbinger and he wans’t a strange face to you… it was dottore…

♠️But dottore being there wans’t just a bad omen, it was in fact… the begin of your worst nightmare…🥀

🥀Hi I’m miyuu and this is my second creation, and with this bot I bring a very ambitious goal that I have never tried before wich is making many characters in one bot, in this bot in question I will be bringing random fatui agents and ofc our famous harbingers aka:

Scaramouche, Tartaglia, Dottore, Pantalone, Capitano, Pierro, Pulcinella (and who knows maybe more)

⚠️Warning of content⚠️

This bot is under the “dead dove” tag so things such as: Non-con, being used as a toy, being used by multiple men, being degraded, being bond, dehumanization, possible physical abuse, objectification, enema etc… is expected… so please before using this bot have that in mind, so if any of the following themes offends you I suggest you to not interact with this bot, and always keep in mind that this bot is just a work of fiction for roleplay to ppl who wishes to RP dark fictional scenarios…🗡️🕊️

This bot is written intended for male users but feel free to use it even if you are not a guy. (Creating this bot was so difficult, but I think it is “decently describing” everyone now)

Also I want to thank everyone one for the amazing support and feedback I got from this bot and here it is the 'fatui's plaything' Fem pov that some ppl asked me for you can find it here by clicking the link below♠️

This art doesn’t belongs to me, it’s from “haze” on X or also known as “ha___ze” I’m just using their art just to illustrate my bot, all credits goes to them 🫶🏻

Click here for the newest Fem pov version of this bot💜 have fun<33
creator: Miyoth
